name: 3pc Modern Coordinate Bath Bundle Set - Threshold™: Ceramic Accessories, Tumbler, Spot Clean
description:
Your bath space will look modern and organized with the 3-Piece Modern Coordinate Bath Bundle Set from Threshold™. This modern bath coordinates set includes a soap dish, soap dispenser and bath tumbler to meet your everyday needs. All of the pieces are ceramic and feature allover ivory speckled hues for an interesting look that suits all your bathroom settings.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
